case_title: MICHAEL DUMAS DMD VS. NICOLETTE BEAZLEY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,839.00 FILED BY DUMAS DMD, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT BEAZLEY, NICOLETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-20-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEAZLEY, NICOLETTE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-07-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506). DEFENDANT AGREES TO MAKE PAYMENTS OF $75.00/MONTH STARTING JANUARY 27, 2012 AND CONTINUING EACH MONTH FOR 10 MONTHS AT THE END OF EACH MONTH. LAST PAYMENT IS FOR $98.00.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUMAS DMD, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-07-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PEARLIE HICKS--MEDICAL BILLER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-07-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-12-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUMAS DMD, MICHAEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-28-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PEARLE HICKS--MEDICAL BILLER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
